news.headline: DERMALOG creates biometric system for Nigerian banks safeguarding accounts of 64M+ customers.
news.summary: In Hamburg, Germany and Lagos, Nigeria, as of December 4, 2024, more than 64 million Nigerians have adopted secure biometric technology for their banking needs. The innovative system was created by DERMALOG, a top German company specializing in this technology.

news.headline: Foot Locker's revenue expected to decrease due to increased discounting and customer hesitance.
Southland's subsidiary wins $60 million contract for new wastewater treatment plant in Southwest, expanding facilities.
news.summary: In Grapevine, Texas, Southland Holdings, Inc. revealed that its subsidiary, Oscar Renda Contracting, secured a significant $60 million contract within its Civil segment. This project involves the construction of a state-of-the-art wastewater treatment plant in the Southwest region. The extensive scope of work encompasses the development of new headworks, an influent pump station, an extended aeration basin, an administration building, a utility water station, and the refurbishment of the crew building. This noteworthy contract award signifies a major undertaking for the company and highlights its expertise in the construction industry.

news.headline: Bark Tech releases Bark Watch, kids' smartwatch with content monitoring capabilities - Dec. 4, 2024, ATLANTA.
news.summary: Atlanta, December 4, 2024 - Bark Technologies has introduced the Bark Watch, the initial smartwatch for kids integrated with Bark's advanced content monitoring feature. This innovative product aims to provide enhanced online safety for families. Serving as a pioneer in the sector, Bark Technologies unveiled this new smartwatch to address the need for a safer digital environment.

news.headline: American Art Resources appoints Fernanda Ogazon as new CEO & President, specializing in healthcare & hospitality design.
news.summary: American Art Resources, a prominent art consulting firm known for its expertise in healthcare and hospitality design, has appointed Fernanda Ogazon as its new Chief Executive Officer and President.

news.headline: European truck manufacturers facing challenges with electric big rigs.
Trump considers new Pentagon appointee.
ToolGen and PlantArcBio are collaborating to develop gene-edited, herbicide tolerant soybeans for global markets to meet increasing agricultural demand.(Collections)
news.summary: A groundbreaking collaboration has been formed to enhance the production of sustainable, high-yielding crops in order to address the increasing agricultural needs worldwide. This partnership involves ToolGen, a top gene editing firm, and PlantArcBio, a prominent ag-biotech company. The agreement was announced on December 4, 2024, in Seoul, South Korea, and Givat Chen, Israel. ToolGen's expertise combined with PlantArcBio's innovative technologies is anticipated to revolutionize crop development and potentially boost agricultural yields by a significant margin.

news.headline: Chewy reports Q3 2024 results: Net sales $2.88B, up 4.8% YoY, Gross margin 29.3%, Net income $3.9M.
news.summary: Chewy, Inc. (NYSE: CHWY) has announced its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2024, which concluded on October 27, 2024. In this quarter, the company reported impressive results with net sales reaching $2.88 billion, showcasing a 4.8 percent growth compared to the previous year. The gross margin also saw a positive trend, increasing to 29.3 percent, marking an 80 basis point rise year over year. Notably, the net income for this period amounted to $3.9 million, which includes expenses for share-based compensation and related taxes totaling $80.4 million. Chewy has solidified its position as a reliable platform for pet parents and partners.

news.headline: BingX launches Christmas Miracle Trading Challenge with $1M USDT prize pool, running from Dec 4-30.
news.summary: In Vilnius, Lithuania on December 4, 2024, BingX, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange worldwide, has revealed its newest event, the Christmas Miracle Trading Challenge. Scheduled from December 4 to December 30, the challenge presents an exciting opportunity for participants to engage in exhilarating trading tasks.

news.headline: TransAlta completes acquisition of Heartland Generation for $542 million, with net cash payment of $215 million.
news.summary: TransAlta Corporation (TSX: TA; NYSE: TAC) has successfully acquired Heartland Generation Ltd. and Alberta Power (2000) Ltd. from Energy Capital Partners for a total purchase price of $542 million. The acquisition encompasses all of Heartland's operations in Alberta and British Columbia. After adjusting for the economic benefits of the Heartland business since October 31, 2023, the net cash payment amounted to $215 million, excluding working capital adjustments.

news.headline: Resolute CS buys NEXUS software platform to enhance global connectivity purchasing. #Acquisition #ConnectivityPlatform
news.summary: Boston-based company Resolute CS has recently completed the acquisition of NEXUS, a unique Expedia-style connectivity software platform, along with its vast data repository. This strategic move indicates Resolute CS's commitment to expanding its technological capabilities, as NEXUS brings valuable resources and expertise to the table. The acquisition marks a significant milestone for Resolute CS, allowing them to enhance their service offerings and broaden their market reach. This acquisition aims to leverage NEXUS's advanced technology and extensive data repository to drive innovation and growth in the company.

news.headline: VIA optronics AG wins awards from Chinese EV maker for pillar-to-pillar display solutions with two 24 inch displays each.
news.summary: In Nuremberg, Germany, VIA optronics AG (OTC: VIAOY) revealed its reception of two business awards from a prominent Chinese electric vehicle company. The awards are for pillar-to-pillar display solutions, with one product featuring a combination of two 24-inch displays on a single cover glass, and the other combining two displays of the same size on a flat cover glass. These awards further enhance VIA's standing as a reliable provider of interactive display solutions.

news.headline: Clear Street launches in UK with FCA approval, joins LME; plans global expansion; pivotal step outside North America.
news.summary: Clear Street, a financial technology firm aiming to modernize brokerages, officially launched Clear Street UK after receiving approval from the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA). Additionally, Clear Street UK has been designated as a Category 1, Ring-dealing member by the London Metal Exchange. This launch marks a significant advancement in Clear Street's global expansion strategy, extending its reach beyond North America.

news.headline: Incase introduces new A.R.C. collection with Duffel, Crossbody Bags, Pouch, and Sleeves. Stylish everyday carry solutions.
news.summary: Leading carry and protection brand, Incase, has recently launched an extensive product range that includes the A.R.C. Duffel, A.R.C. Crossbody Bags, A.R.C. Compact Pouch, and A.R.C. Sleeves. The diverse lineup offers ultimate versatility for users looking for backpacks, bags, sleeves, and more. This release was made on December 4, 2024, in Corona, California.

news.headline: Ascent and The Forward Fund collaborate to launch $7 million fund for Cape Fear Community College students, improving workforce training.
news.summary: Students at Cape Fear Community College are set to receive valuable workforce training opportunities. This initiative comes as Ascent, a prominent provider of financial products and student support services, aims to enhance accessibility to education for more individuals. The endeavor is expected to benefit numerous students by equipping them with the necessary skills to succeed in the workforce. The news was announced on December 4, 2024, in San Diego, highlighting Ascent's dedication to helping students achieve their academic and economic goals.

news.headline: Salesforce revenue surpasses expectations due to strong AI strategy, beating estimates.
The Broe Group buys 14-acre former Kellogg's facility in Fulton County to create largest rail real estate site in Atlanta.
news.summary: In a significant move, on December 4, 2024, The Broe Group, a formidable infrastructure company worth billions, secured a rare infill acreage at 5601 Bucknell in Fulton County Industrial District, Atlanta. This strategic acquisition spans 14 acres and offers exceptional last-mile connectivity to the Southeastern U.S. region.

news.headline: Dollarama's Q3 2025: 3.3% sales growth, EPS up 6.5% to $0.98. Aims for 2,200 stores in Canada by 2034. Acquires land in Calgary for logistics hub.
news.summary: In the latest report, a notable 3.3% growth in comparable store sales has been recorded. Additionally, there has been a significant 6.5% rise in diluted net earnings per share, reaching $0.98. This success has prompted a decision to raise the long-term store target in Canada to 2,200 stores by 2034. Furthermore, an agreement has been made to acquire land in the Calgary, Alberta region to establish a logistics hub in Western Canada. The company is making strides in its expansion plans and aims to capitalize on its current momentum for sustained growth.

news.headline: Altair partners with Auburn Univ on $1.25M AFWERX contract to enhance Vortex Rocket Engines performance using FlightStream™.
news.summary: Altair® FlightStream™ is set to enhance engine performance in significantly less time compared to conventional techniques. The collaboration between Altair and Auburn University's Samuel Ginn College of Engineering aims to achieve this goal. Altair, a prominent player in computational intelligence listed on Nasdaq as ALTR, is based in Troy, Michigan. The initiative is anticipated to revolutionize engine optimization by speeding up the process. The development is expected to benefit various sectors and stakeholders by providing advanced solutions efficiently.

news.headline: Inspira and Westchester Medical Center collaborate to evaluate INSPIRA™ ART100 in clinical settings.
news.summary: In Ra'anana, Israel on December 4, 2024, Inspira Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd. announced a strategic partnership with Westchester Medical. Inspira Technologies, traded on Nasdaq under tickers IINN and IINNW, is known for its innovative life support technologies.

news.headline: Gogo acquires Satcom Direct, saves $18m, appoints new CEO Chris Moore, transition for Oakleigh Thorne.
news.summary: Gogo Inc. has made significant strides in advancing their Low Earth Orbit (LEO) strategy with the launch of an expanded platform, resulting in an impressive run-rate cost savings of $18 million on its first day. This development coincided with the appointment of Chris Moore as the new Chief Executive Officer, taking over from Oakleigh Thorne who will now serve as Executive Chair. The company is headquartered in Broomfield, Colorado, and the latest updates were announced on December 4, 2024.

news.headline: LiveU's LU-REQON1 enhances safety for law enforcement with real-time video & data connectivity. Hackensack, NJ, Dec 4, 2024.
news.summary: In Hackensack, N.J. on December 4, 2024, it was reported that Law Enforcement and Public Safety officials are in need of dependable visual intelligence tools for their operations. The focus is on fast, user-friendly, and durable real-time critical video and data connectivity through a bonded IP link. This system aims to offer efficient and effective solutions to aid in their mission.

news.headline: Elevate named to Inc.'s 2024 Best in Business list for technology modernization, recognized as an industry-leading company.
news.summary: A prestigious annual list has recognized Elevate, a leading consumer directed benefits administration platform, as one of the top companies in the industry. The Inc. 2024 Best in Business list, announced on December 4th in Denver, highlights Elevate in the On the Rise category for its exceptional performance. This acknowledgment demonstrates Elevate's continued success and expertise in the field, solidifying its position among the best in the business.

news.headline: StePacPPC replaces ice-filled polystyrene foam with eco-friendly packaging for broccoli. TEFEN, Israel - Dec 4, 2024.
news.summary: StePacPPC has introduced eco-friendly packaging solutions that are aiding producers and shippers in moving away from traditional ice-filled polystyrene foam and waxed carton boxes. The company, based in TEFEN, Israel, unveiled its cutting-edge Modified Atmosphere/Modified Humidity (MA/MH) packaging on December 4, 2024. This sustainable packaging option is making a significant impact within the industry, emphasizing the importance of environmental responsibility.

news.headline: 1 Hotel Tokyo, a new nature-inspired urban icon, to open in Japan's capital, blending sustainable luxury and cutting-edge design. From SH Hotels & Resorts, founded by Barry Sternlicht, set to debut soon in 2024.
news.summary: Luxury and innovation meet in Tokyo as SH Hotels & Resorts, the eco-conscious hotel brand led by Barry Sternlicht, announces the launch of 1 Hotel Tokyo. The hotel is set to open its doors in the capital city, promising a unique blend of sustainability and exquisite design. Stay tuned for more updates on this exciting venture.

news.headline: Black Friday sees a 600% increase in retail cyber scams according to Darktrace, AI cybersecurity leader.
news.summary: In Cambridge, UK on December 4, 2024, Darktrace, a prominent AI cybersecurity company, disclosed a notable increase in cyber attacks targeting the retail sector as the 2024 holiday shopping season commenced. Insights provided by Darktrace's threat intelligence team, based on data collected from various sources within the Darktrace network, highlighted a significant spike in attacks.

news.headline: Axos Bank and Way.com partner to help customers save on car costs after refinancing; Axos named best online bank.
news.summary: In Fremont, California on December 4, 2024, Axos Bank and the top-ranked auto super app Way.com have joined forces to offer customers significant savings and security after refinancing their vehicles through Axos. Axos Bank, recognized as the best online bank, is a leading figure in digital banking. This collaboration aims to provide benefits for customers in terms of financial protection and reduced expenses.

news.headline: Potomac Bankshares, Inc. appoints Shane Bell as CFO of Bank of Charles Town; Bell now serves as EVP and CFO.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, in Charles Town, West Virginia, the parent company of Bank of Charles Town, Potomac Bankshares, Inc. (OTC: PTBS), revealed the appointment of M. Shane Bell as Executive Vice President and Chief. BCT-The Community's Bank, the appointed bank, aims to boost its operations with this strategic leadership move. This decision signals a significant development for the company and its stakeholders, demonstrating a commitment to growth and innovation in the banking sector.

news.headline: Dunes Point Capital, LP acquires Kravet, LLC, industry leader in home furnishings. Located in Woodbury, NY.
news.summary: A private equity firm, Dunes Point Capital, LP (DPC), has completed the acquisition of Kravet, LLC, a leading company based in Woodbury, NY. Kravet specializes in providing to-the-trade home furnishings such as fabric, furniture, wall coverings, trimmings, and carpet. This acquisition marks a significant move in the industry and will likely have a notable impact on the market. The financial details of the acquisition, including the specific numbers involved, have not been disclosed at this time.

news.headline: Illinois House Speaker hosting 3rd Annual Blue Christmas Toy Drive and Fundraiser on December 18 to spread holiday cheer.
news.summary: In Chicago on December 4, 2024, Illinois House Speaker Emanuel "Chris" Welch will be hosting the 3rd Annual Blue Christmas Toy Drive and Fundraiser. This event aims to spread holiday cheer and support children and families in need. It will be a festive occasion with the goal of making a positive impact, showcasing the spirit of giving during the holiday season.

news.headline: Stagwell Marketing Cloud's The People Platform names George Brady as CEO, ex-President, and CRO, effective immediately.
news.summary: In New York on December 4, 2024, it was announced that the former President and Chief Revenue Officer of The People Platform will now take on the role of CEO. The People Platform™, a division of Stagwell Marketing Cloud trading as NASDAQ: STGW, is an enterprise software company known for utilizing mobile and location data for mapping and sequencing purposes. The transition in leadership is effective immediately.

news.headline: Discseel® Procedure shown effective in largest Spine Regenerative Medicine study. Offers quick recovery with patients returning to activities within a week.
news.summary: A recent groundbreaking study conducted in Dallas on the Discseel Procedure has been touted as the world's largest Spine Regenerative Medicine study. This outpatient treatment has enabled patients to resume work and activities within just a week. The publication of this landmark Spine Study has brought attention to the innovative Discseel® Procedure.

news.headline: Pål Eitrheim to be EVP Nordics at Statkraft by June 2025, currently EVP for Renewables at Equinor.
news.summary: In Oslo on December 4th, Pål Eitrheim has been named the Executive Vice President for the business area Nordics at Statkraft. At present, Eitrheim holds the position of Executive Vice President for Renewables at Equinor. He is expected to join Statkraft no later than June 2025.

news.headline: Mangoceuticals, Inc. is investigating potential stock manipulation post-reverse stock split due to irregular trading and increased shareholder accounts.
news.summary: Mangoceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: MGRX), based in Dallas, TX, declared on December 4, 2024, that they are initiating an inquiry into potential stock manipulation issues post their recent reverse stock split on October 16, 2024. The company specializes in men's health and wellness products distributed through a secure telemedicine platform. A surge in shareholder accounts and abnormal trading behaviors prompted the investigation, raising suspicions of stock manipulation activities.

news.headline: Alta Global's 20-week Warrior Training Program partnership with UFC Gyms sees strong demand, surpassing projections.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, in New York, Alta Global Group (NYSE American: MMA) announced a successful partnership with UFC Gym Group. The company, known for its advanced technology in martial arts and combat sports training, revealed the positive reception of its 20-week Warrior Training Program. This program, designed to turn novices into combat athletes, has experienced high demand, surpassing initial expectations with a significant increase in sign-ups in recent weeks. Alta credits this success to its effective utilization of social media, brand ambassadors, and mobile marketing strategies to expand its reach to MMA enthusiasts and improve customer acquisition.

news.headline: First Helium advances licensing of strategic 7-15 and 7-30 Leduc wells targeting light oil, completing survey of 7-30 PUD oil location.
news.summary: A company has finished surveying 7 out of 30 proven undeveloped ("PUD") oil locations. This survey marks progress in the development of these oil sites.

news.headline: Nutriband Inc. CEO to speak at 2024 Noble Conference in Boca Raton on Dec 4th about AVERSA technology.
news.summary: Serguei Melnik is scheduled to present at the upcoming Noble Conference to elaborate on the latest advancements related to the company's AVERSA technology.

news.headline: A patient with advanced liver cancer treated with Can-Fite's Namodenoson drug survives 8 years with complete cure.
news.summary: In Ramat Gan, Israel, on December 4th, 2024, Can-Fite BioPharma Ltd. revealed that a patient enrolled in a compassionate use program for Namodenoson in their Phase II Liver Cancer Study has achieved a remarkable overall survival time of 8 years with a complete response. Can-Fite BioPharma Ltd., listed on NYSE American as CANF and TASE as CANF, is a biotechnology company specializing in proprietary small molecule drugs for oncological and inflammatory conditions. This patient's exceptional outcome showcases the potential efficacy of Namodenoson in treating liver cancer.

news.headline: DMC Global extends put option on Arcadia purchase to September 6, 2026. DMC currently holds 60% stake, with option to acquire remaining 40% later.
news.summary: BROOMFIELD, Colorado - DMC Global Inc. announced an agreement with its joint venture partners, the Munera family, regarding Arcadia Products, LLC. DMC, listed on Nasdaq as BOOM, acquired a 60% stake in Arcadia on December 23, 2021. The agreement sets September 6, 2026, as the earliest date for DMC to purchase the remaining 40% under the put option in Arcadia's operating agreement. Originally, the put option would have been exercisable on December 23, 2024, but now DMC retains the right to acquire the remaining 40% through a call option exercisable on the same date.

news.headline: Checkmarx named Leader & Fast Mover in 2024 GigaOm Radar Report for Software Supply Chain Security, prioritizing SSCS.
news.summary: Checkmarx, a prominent player in cloud-native application security for enterprises, has been recognized as a Leader and Fast Mover in the first GigaOm Radar Report for Software Supply Chain Security 2024. The report emphasizes the importance of prioritizing software supply chain security (SSCS) in the face of growing software complexity and threat surface expansion. According to the report, investing in SSCS and innovative technologies can enhance defenses and lower risks. This recognition solidifies Checkmarx's position as an industry leader, showcasing its commitment to addressing security challenges.

news.headline: Tiziana Life Sciences expands Phase 2 clinical trial for SPMS to prestigious U.S. medical centers in the Northeast.
news.summary: In New York on Dec. 04, 2024, Tiziana Life Sciences, Ltd. (Nasdaq: TLSA) shared plans to broaden its Phase 2 clinical trial for intranasal foralumab, a fully human, anti-CD3 monoclonal antibody, targeting non-active secondary progressive multiple sclerosis (SPMS). The company, recognized for developing innovative immunomodulation therapies, will now encompass various prestigious institutions in the Northeast of the United States within the trial sites.

news.headline: Bluefin appoints Andrew Monroe as Chief Revenue Officer and Cheng Chieh Chen as Senior VP, Europe to drive growth.
news.summary: Bluefin, a leading provider of PCI-validated encryption and tokenization solutions safeguarding payments and sensitive data, has appointed Andrew Monroe as the new Chief Revenue Officer. With a background in driving revenue growth in the payment sector, Andrew served as the VP Sales and Managing Director for North America. Additionally, Cheng Chieh Chen has joined as Senior Vice President for Europe. This strategic move aims to bolster Bluefin's presence in the European market.

news.headline: Class Nickel 1 to expand on 2.7Mt 1.0% Ni resources at Alexo-Dundonald Project in Timmins, Canada, covering 3,093 hectares.
news.summary: In an update provided by Class 1 Nickel and Technologies Ltd., the company (CSE: NICO | OTCQB: NICLF) announced developments regarding its Alexo-Dundonald Nickel Sulphide Project. The project encompasses approximately 3,093 hectares (30.93 km2) and is situated around 45 km northeast of Timmins, Ontario, a prominent mining hub.

news.headline: Calian creates independent U.S. subsidiary, Calian U.S. Inc., focused on U.S. government and defense sector.
news.summary: Calian Group has revealed the establishment of Calian U.S. Inc., a new independent subsidiary with a primary focus on the U.S. market. This subsidiary will concentrate on providing services specifically tailored to the U.S. government and defense sectors.

news.headline: DEKA Laser partners with Romeo & Juliette Hair Removal in NYC for advanced hair removal, global training center.
news.summary: DEKA Laser, a leading global provider of medical laser technologies, has recently formed a partnership with Romeo & Juliette Hair Removal, a highly esteemed permanent hair removal center situated on Fifth Avenue in New York City. This collaboration marks a significant milestone for both entities as Romeo & Juliette will now serve as a key training center for DEKA's laser hair removal techniques worldwide. This partnership solidifies their commitment to excellence in the industry and positions Romeo & Juliette as a premier destination for DEKA training with a focus on the Again system.

news.headline: Iron Mountain will appear at Barclays 22nd Annual Global Tech Conference on Dec 11, 2024, with Executive VP/CFO as speaker. Webcast available.
news.summary: Iron Mountain Incorporated, a renowned player in information management services and listed on NYSE as IRM, is set to engage in a fireside chat at the Barclays 22nd Annual Global Technology Conference in San Francisco, CA. Scheduled for Wednesday, December 11, 2024, at 8:05 am PT (11:05 am ET), the chat will feature Barry A. Hytinen, the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of the company. The presentation will be webcasted and available on the Investor Relation platform.

news.headline: First patient dosed in EyePoint's global Phase 3 trial of DURAVYU for Wet AMD treatment. #clinicaltrial #maculardegeneration
UL Solutions (NYSE: ULS) to attend Raymond James 2024 TMT & Consumer Conference on Dec 9. Global leader in safety science serving 110+ countries.
news.summary: Northbrook, Illinois - UL Solutions Inc., a renowned company in applied safety science (NYSE: ULS), has disclosed that its senior management will be participating in the Raymond James 2024 TMT & Consumer Conference on December 9, 2024. UL Solutions operates in over 110 countries globally, assisting customers in converting safety, security, and sustainability obstacles into advantages. The company delivers testing and inspection services.

news.headline: Westwood Financial CEO Mark Bratt to retire at end of 2024 after 6 years in role. Firm is more than 50 years old.
news.summary: Los Angeles-headquartered Westwood Financial, a prominent retail real estate investment firm with over 50 years of experience, revealed that Mark Bratt will retire from his position as Chief Executive Officer. Bratt, who has been leading the company for six years, informed the Board of his decision to step down as CEO by the end of 2024. He took on the role of CEO in January 2019 and expressed that it was time to embark on a new chapter in his career following six rewarding years at Westwood Financial.
